_max_inline_style_files_doc: Point 45: max count of src/ TS/TSX files containing style={{ (default 30 if omitted).
_max_any_count_doc: Point 51: max matches of : any / as any / any[] in src/ excluding graphql/generated (default 20).
_max_console_logs_doc: Point 58: max console.log( occurrences in src/ (default 10).
_localstorage_allow_files_doc: Point 59: UI prefs use localStorage outside tokenManager; list those paths here.
